column3: rule
column4: why

column3: Min 4.5:1 for body text, 3:1 for large text
column4: Readability for all users including colorblind

column3: Minimum 44x44pt (iOS) / 48x48dp (Android)
column4: Prevents mis-taps and accessibility issues

column3: Visible 2–4px ring on interactive elements
column4: Screen reader users need to locate focus

column3: Tab order matches visual order, all controls keyboard-accessible
column4: Keyboard-only users must navigate fully

column3: Descriptive alt text for all meaningful images
column4: Screen readers must convey image meaning

column3: Show spinner/progress when async > 300ms
column4: Prevents user confusion and perceived lag

column3: Display errors near the related field, state cause + fix
column4: Clear guidance reduces user frustration

column3: Micro-interactions 150–300ms, complex ≤400ms
column4: Feels responsive without being jarring

column3: Design smallest screen first, scale up
column4: Ensures accessibility on all screen sizes

column3: Use srcset/sizes, lazy load non-critical assets
column4: Reduces bandwidth and improves performance

column3: Visible label per input, not placeholder-only
column4: Labels remain visible after input

column3: Show helpful message + action when no content
column4: Prevents confusion on blank screens

column3: Design light/dark together, test contrast separately
column4: Dark mode isn't just inverted colors

column3: Opacity + cursor change + semantic disabled
column4: Users must know controls are unavailable

column3: Keep UI away from notch, status bar, gesture area
column4: Content hidden behind system chrome is inaccessible

column3: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, disable heavy animations
column4: Motion sensitivity affects vestibular system

column3: Error messages include retry/edit option
column4: Users must have clear path to fix problems

column3: Keep JS bundle under 100KB, LCP < 2.5s
column4: Slow apps frustrate users and increase bounce rate

column3: Swipe actions must show affordance (chevron, label)
column4: Hidden gestures are undiscoverable

column3: Use for confirmations, not decoration
column4: Adds tactile response without being annoying
